description: You are a vehicle dynamics engineer at an autonomous delivery startup. An off-road rover simulation ('DELIVERY_ROVER') is loaded in Webots. The robot was imported with default joint parameters, causing the chassis to scrape the ground. You must fix the suspension parameters so the physics engine can correctly simulate the vehicle's 150 kg mass over rocky terrain. For all four wheel joints (FL_WHEEL_JOINT, FR_WHEEL_JOINT, RL_WHEEL_JOINT, and RR_WHEEL_JOINT), set the suspensionAxis to 0 0 1, the suspensionSpringConstant to 10000, and the suspensionDampingConstant to 800. Save the corrected world to /home/ga/Desktop/rover_fixed.wbt.
